case_title: KIRCHER, VINCENT vs. GOULD, LANNY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOULD, LANNY YANTES, ANN MARIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 445 O"FARRELL ST. #420, S.F. $1,200.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-18-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, IN THE EVENT DEFTS VACATE THE PREMISES AND TURN IN THE KEYS TO THE HOTEL MGR BY 12:00 NOON ON 04/18/00 OR PAYS ALL RENT THEN PLTF WILL VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS. DEFTS TO PREPARE ANY AND ALL DOCUMENTS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT GOULD, LANNY YANTES, ANN MARIE SUMMONS ISSUED
